features.name: assert statement in always @* block
features.description: Code should include an assert statement placed inside an always @* combinational procedural block

features.name: assert with constant expression in conditional branch
features.description: Code should include an assert statement with a constant expression placed inside an if conditional branch

features.name: assert in always @* with reset conditional
features.description: Code should include an assert statement inside an always @* block with an if statement checking a reset signal
features.snippet:
always @* begin
    if (resetn) begin
        assert (0);
    end
end
